data.name: Idle Harem Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
You are a lowly lust demon dreaming of making the goddess Era yours in the future. One day, the bored and sadistic goddess, after hearing your dream, descends into your dungeon with a bet: survive and seduce her seven chosen warriors, and she will consider making your dreams a reality.

Idle Harem Dungeon is a relaxing idle game about defeating an endless number of adventurers flocking into your dungeon. Grow stronger through battle, meet eight beautiful girls, seduce them, and make them part of your dream harem.

  • Eight lovely and unique girls

  • Beautiful pixel art aesthetic

  • Cute and interesting dialogues

  • Floating eyeballs with wings

  • Numbers going up

data.short_description: Upon hearing your dreams of making her yours one day, the beautiful and sadistic goddess Era comes to you with a proposal: survive and seduce her seven chosen warriors, and she will consider making your dreams a reality. Will you succeed or die, over and over again, trying?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 128MB
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
